14. `CalculateDiscount_NegativePoints_ThrowsArgumentOutOfRangeException` - CalculateDiscount, input validation
15. `PlaceOrder_InvalidEmailFormat_ThrowsArgumentException` - PlaceOrder, input validation
16. `CalculateDiscount_MediumPoints_Returns10Percent` - CalculateDiscount, business logic
17. `PlaceOrder_EmptyItemList_ThrowsArgumentException` - PlaceOrder, input validation
18. `Constructor_NullEmailService_ThrowsArgumentNullException` - Constructor, guard clause
19. `CalculateDiscount_LowPoints_Returns5Percent` - CalculateDiscount, business logic
20. `CancelOrder_NonExistentOrder_ThrowsInvalidOperationException` - CancelOrder, error handling
21. `PlaceOrder_NegativePrice_ThrowsArgumentException` - PlaceOrder, input validation
22. `CalculateDiscount_ZeroPoints_ReturnsZero` - CalculateDiscount, edge case
